items.title_en: Analysis: The threat to the Fed's independence isn't over
items.title_zh: 分析：对美联储独立性的威胁尚未结束
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump has waged a long campaign to rein in the Fed. Prosecutors' decision to drop an investigation into Jerome Powell isn't the end.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统发起了一场长期的运动来控制美联储。检察官决定放弃对杰罗姆·鲍威尔的调查并不是结束。

items.title_en: Google to invest up to $40 billion in Anthropic as search giant spreads its AI bets
items.title_zh: 随着搜索巨头扩大人工智能赌注，谷歌将向 Anthropic 投资高达 400 亿美元
items.desc_en: Anthropic said its latest agreement with Google expands on a longstanding partnership between the two companies.
items.desc_zh: Anthropic 表示，其与谷歌的最新协议扩大了两家公司之间的长期合作伙伴关系。

items.title_en: Nuclear reactor company X-energy shares surge 26% as AI drives interest in its IPO

items.desc_en: Advanced nuclear reactor company X-energy began trading Friday as the AI boom and electrification broadly spark a flurry of interest in the nuclear industry.
items.desc_zh: 随着人工智能热潮和电气化广泛引发人们对核工业的浓厚兴趣，先进核反应堆公司 X-energy 于周五开始交易。

items.title_zh: 随着债券持有人权衡特朗普的救助计划，精神航空公司的时钟滴答作响。接下来可能会发生什么
items.desc_en: President Trump has said the government could buy Spirit.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普总统表示政府可以购买精神号。

items.desc_en: Kosovo's court sentences two men to life imprisonment and another to a 30-year term for the 2023 attack.

items.title_en: Retirees are thinking of annuities the wrong way — and it may trip them up, advisors say

items.desc_en: EU approves a $106 billion loan package to help Ukraine after Hungary lifts its veto  NPR$106 Billion Loan Reflects E.U.’s View That Peace in Ukraine Is Far Away  The New York TimesE.U. approves a $10
items.desc_zh: 匈牙利取消否决权后，欧盟批准了一项 1060 亿美元的贷款计划来帮助乌克兰 1060 亿尼泊尔卢比的贷款反映出欧盟认为乌克兰的和平还很遥远批准 10 美元

items.title_en: Epstein housed abuse victims in London flats, BBC reveals
items.title_zh: 英国广播公司透露，爱泼斯坦在伦敦公寓安置了虐待受害者
items.desc_en: The revelations intensify concerns about repeated police decisions not to investigate 2015 trafficking claims.
items.desc_zh: 这些揭露加剧了人们对警方一再决定不调查 2015 年人口贩运指控的担忧。

items.title_en: In Britain, 7 Unelected Lords Are Helping to Block an Assisted Dying Bill - The New York Times
items.title_zh: 英国七位非民选上议院议员协助阻止安乐死法案 - 纽约时报中文网
items.desc_en: In Britain, 7 Unelected Lords Are Helping to Block an Assisted Dying Bill  The New York TimesAssisted dying bill fails to become law after running out of time in parliament – as it happened  The Guard
items.desc_zh: 在英国，七名未经选举产生的上议院正在帮助阻止《纽约时报》的《协助死亡法案》《纽约时报》《协助死亡法案》在议会超时后未能成为法律——正如它所发生的那样

items.desc_zh: 在印度，丝绸生产是一个日益高科技的行业。

items.title_en: White House memo claims mass AI theft by Chinese firms
items.title_zh: 白宫备忘录称中国公司大规模盗窃人工智能
items.desc_en: A memo from Michael Kratsios says firms, mainly in China, are wrongfully distilling US AI models.
items.desc_zh: Michael Kratsios 的一份备忘录称，主要是中国的公司错误地借鉴了美国的人工智能模型。

items.title_en: Meta says it will cut 8,000 jobs as AI spending grows

items.desc_zh: 此次裁员是员工数周以来一直期待的，这将是 Meta 自 2023 年以来最大规模的裁员。

items.title_en: Xbox cuts prices for Game Pass but ends day-one Call of Duty access
items.title_zh: Xbox 降低 Game Pass 价格，但结束《使命召唤》第一天的访问
items.desc_en: New Call of Duty games will be added to the subscription service "about a year" after release, Microsoft said.
items.desc_zh: 微软表示，新的《使命召唤》游戏将在发布“大约一年”后添加到订阅服务中。

items.title_en: UK gaming icon Peter Molyneux on AI, his final creation and a changing industry
items.title_zh: 英国游戏偶像 Peter Molyneux 谈人工智能、他的最终创作和不断变化的行业
items.desc_en: The creator of iconic series such as Fable says Masters of Albion will be the last game he makes.
items.desc_zh: 《神鬼寓言》等标志性系列游戏的创作者表示，《阿尔比恩大师》将是他制作的最后一款游戏。

items.title_en: Meta to track workers' clicks and keystrokes to train AI
items.title_zh: Meta 跟踪工人的点击和击键以训练人工智能
items.desc_en: The firm will take data from the way employees work for its artificial intelligence models.
items.desc_zh: 该公司将从员工的工作方式中获取数据用于其人工智能模型。

items.title_en: AI hacking tools like Mythos can be 'net positive' says top cyber official
items.title_zh: 高级网络官员表示，像 Mythos 这样的人工智能黑客工具可能具有“净积极性”
items.desc_en: The head of the National Cyber Security Centre says frontier AI tools can be a force for good - if kept out of the wrong hands.
items.desc_zh: 国家网络安全中心负责人表示，前沿人工智能工具如果不落入坏人之手，可以成为一股正义的力量。
